subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-11
subcodes.first_line: the Blessed Beauty has shut the door on such differences and has referred all affairs to the House of Justice
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک سد ابواب اینگونه اختلافات فرمودند و امور را راجع ببیت العدل اعظم کردند
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
